page_metadata.biotools__summary: Resampling-based method for testing functional categories in gene expression experiments. It can be applied to 2-sample and multi-class comparisons, or simple linear regressions. Other experimental designs can also be accommodated through user-defined functions.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Resampling-based method for testing functional categories in gene expression experiments. It can be applied to 2-sample and multi-class comparisons, or simple linear regressions. Other experimental designs can also be accommodated through user-defined functions.
